data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="NO₂/N₂O₄ Equilibrium Color Change Experiment" goal="Observe and compare the color changes of NO₂/N₂O₄ gas mixture in round-bottom flasks under hot and cold water baths to study the temperature dependence of the equilibrium 2NO₂(g) ⇌ N₂O₄(g)." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="flask_hot" type="round_bottom_flask" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="flask_cold" type="round_bottom_flask" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="latex_tube" type="latex_tube" />
      <Component id="spring_clip_1" type="spring_clip" />
      <Component id="spring_clip_2" type="spring_clip" />
      <Component id="beaker_hot" type="beaker" capacity="500ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_cold" type="beaker" capacity="500ml" />
      <Component id="stand_hot" type="stand" />
      <Component id="stand_cold" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="NO2_N2O4_gas" state="gas" />
      <Reagent name="hot_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="ice_water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Attach vessel="flask_hot" support="stand_hot" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="flask_cold" support="stand_cold" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="latex_tube" vessel="flask_hot" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="latex_tube" vessel="flask_cold" id="step_3" />
      <Insert tool="spring_clip_1" vessel="latex_tube" id="step_4" />
      <Insert tool="spring_clip_2" vessel="latex_tube" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="flask_hot" reagent="NO2_N2O4_gas" volume="250ml" id="step_6" />
      <Add vessel="flask_cold" reagent="NO2_N2O4_gas" volume="250ml" id="step_7" />
      <Insert tool="spring_clip_1" vessel="latex_tube" id="step_8" />
      <Insert tool="spring_clip_2" vessel="latex_tube" id="step_9" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_hot" reagent="H2O" volume="400 mL" id="step_10" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_cold" reagent="H2O" volume="400 mL" id="step_11" />
      <Insert tool="flask_hot" vessel="beaker_hot" id="step_12" />
      <Insert tool="flask_cold" vessel="beaker_cold" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="5 min" id="step_14" />
      <Wait time="observe color changes in both flasks" id="step_15" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 组装实验装置：将两个圆底烧瓶分别固定在支架上，连接乳胶管并用弹簧夹夹紧，完成气体传递系统的搭建。
向两个圆底烧瓶中分别充入等体积的NO₂/N₂O₄气体，并再次用弹簧夹夹紧乳胶管，确保气体密封。
分别向两个烧杯中加入适量的水，准备热水浴和冷水浴。
将装有NO₂/N₂O₄气体的烧瓶分别放入热水浴和冷水浴中，开始进行温度对比实验。
等待5分钟，观察两个烧瓶中气体颜色的变化，比较不同温度下NO₂/N₂O₄平衡体系的颜色差异。
